title: Inventory ad
brief:
Hook:

- Skip the searching , we’ll match you with the right car.
- With over 100 quality used cars, why not start your search here?
- Your next car is here… you just haven’t found it yet.

Offer/ Body:

At Ralph D’Silva Used Cars, we offer one of the largest ranges of quality pre-owned vehicles in Melbourne’s northern suburbs.

We stock a wide selection of reliable used cars, with options to suit every lifestyle and budget. 

With finance options available and vehicles ready to drive away, we make the process simple from start to finish.

Backed by years of experience, our team is here to help you find the right car, not just any car.

CTA: 

Tell us what you’re looking for in the short form below, and we’ll guide you through the process.

title: Car buying ad
brief:
Car buying ad:
Hook:

- Don’t have the time or energy to sell your car? We’ll take it off your hands.
- We’re actively looking to buy quality used cars… like yours.
- We don’t just sell cars, we also buy quality used cars like yours.
- It’s time to move on… from your old car

Body/ offer: 

If you have a low-kilometre, late model vehicle with a solid service history, we wanna hear from you.

We keep things simple. 

No time wasters, no back and forth, and no dealing with strangers. 

Just a smooth, straightforward process handled by a trusted dealership from start to finish.

Whether you’re upgrading, downsizing, or just curious, we make selling your car seamless.

CTA:

If this sounds like you, fill out our short form below, 

which takes less than a minute to complete, 

and a member of our team will be in touch with you shortly.

title: 2024 GWM Haval H6 Premium Auto Used
brief:

If you’ve been waiting for the right SUV to pop up, this might be your sign the 2024 Haval H6 Premium, drive away at $27,990.

Body:
If you want an SUV that looks sharp, feels modern, and makes everyday driving easy, this H6 Premium is well worth a look. 

It’s got the smoothness of an automatic, a 2.0L petrol engine, room for five, 18-inch alloys, and with just 2,333km on the clock, it’s barely getting started. 

At $27,990 drive away, this week’s pick makes upgrading feel like a pretty easy decision.

title: Informative Reel - Cannon Vs Cannon Alpha
brief:
Hook:
Two tough utes. One big decision. Cannon vs Cannon Alpha.

Body:
Think of it like this, the Cannon is the hard-working all-rounder, built for buyers who want a capable, no-fuss, work-ready ute with strong diesel performance, everyday usability, a 12.3-inch touchscreen, and up to 3.5-tonne braked towing on relevant variants. 

The Cannon Alpha steps things up for drivers who want their ute to feel more premium, with a more luxurious cabin, a bigger 14.6-inch infotainment screen, hybrid and plug-in hybrid options, and the same serious towing confidence. 

So really, both are built to get the job done — it just comes down to whether you want practical and proven, or premium with a bit extra.

CTA:
Visit GWM Werribee and compare the Cannon and Cannon Alpha for yourself.

title: Informative Reel - H6 VS H6GT
brief:
Hook:
Practical or sporty? Here’s the real difference between the H6 and H6GT.

Body:
The H6 is the more family-focused mid-size SUV, with petrol, hybrid and plug-in hybrid options designed for everyday driving and longer trips. 

The H6GT is the sportier, coupe-style option, with a more individual design and the choice of 2.0L turbo petrol or PHEV. 

Both bring smart tech, advanced safety, and a 7-year unlimited kilometre warranty — so it really comes down to your vibe.

CTA:
Enquire now or visit Werribee GWM Haval and pick your side — H6 or H6GT.

title: Car of the Week - Cannon Ute
brief:
GWM Cannon

Hook:
Work Monday to Friday. Escape Saturday and Sunday. The GWM Cannon is built for both.

Body:
If you want a ute that can handle the workday and still look good on the weekend, the GWM Cannon ticks both boxes. 

You’ve got a 12.3-inch touchscreen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, a roomy dual-cab interior, advanced safety tech, and on selected variants, a 2.4L turbo-diesel pushing 135kW and 480Nm. 

Plus, it’s backed by a 7-year unlimited kilometre warranty… so honestly, it’d be rude not to take a look.

CTA:
Come in and see the Cannon range for yourself at GWM Werribee today.

title: Informative Reel
brief:
**HOOK***"If you feel like you're filling up more than you used to — your car might be the reason."*

**BODY***"There are a few things that quietly kill your fuel economy and most people have no idea.*

*Old engine oil makes your engine work harder than it should. A clogged air filter restricts the airflow your engine needs to run efficiently. Under-inflated tyres create rolling resistance — your car's literally pushing harder to move forward.*

*None of these feel dramatic. Your car still drives. But week after week, you're paying for it at the bowser.*

*The good news? A standard service fixes all of it. Oil and filter change, air filter check, tyre rotation and pressure — done.*

*At Westside Auto, an Essential service starts from $249 with same or next day bookings."*

**CTA***"Link in bio to book. Don't let a skipped service cost you more at the pump."*
